alternatives.name: Wired panic hardware + alarm panel integration
alternatives.tradeoffs: High installation labor; conduit to each door; retrofit disruption in 49-yr-old buildings; ongoing panel maintenance; certified integrator required. ~55% market share.

alternatives.name: Mechanical-only door alarms (no monitoring)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero monitoring: staff learn of events only by physical discovery or triggered alarm heard locally; no compliance log; no remote visibility. ~30% market share.

alternatives.name: Wireless IoT alarmed exit guards ← Türwächter category
alternatives.tradeoffs: Battery management overhead; wireless range limited in concrete (C3/C4); proprietary protocol (C6); no native integration with BACnet/KNX. ~15% market share.

alternatives.name: Security personnel stationed / patrolling exits
alternatives.tradeoffs: High recurring labor cost; coverage gaps during breaks/shifts; human error; no automated log; scales poorly to multi-building campuses. <5% market share.

alternatives.name: Do nothing / accept risk
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero P1 burden; compliance violation risk; insurance liability; state audit findings; zero monitoring of unauthorized entry through fire exits. Most common current state in budget-constrained districts.
